name: journal-reader
description: Electron PDF reader for literature with annotation and citation figure popup

scripts.build:packages: npm run --workspace @journal-reader/types build && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/parser build && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/storage build && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/pdf-core build && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/ui build
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/desktop build
scripts.typecheck: npm run --workspace @journal-reader/types typecheck && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/parser typecheck && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/storage typecheck && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/pdf-core typecheck && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/ui typecheck && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/desktop typecheck
scripts.start: npm run rebuild:native && npm run build:packages && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/desktop build:main && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/desktop build:preload && npm run --workspace @journal-reader/desktop dev
